summary: Comprehensive testing of AURA V3 features - Theme System (3 modes), Quote of the Day, and New Logo. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new V3 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Theme system implementation is well-designed with CSS custom properties for all 3 modes (light/moonlight/dark)
Theme persistence via localStorage ('aura-theme') works correctly across page navigation
ThemeContext provides cycleTheme() for sidebar toggle and setTheme() for Settings page cards
Quote of the Day API returns rotating quotes based on day of year and 6-hour window
New AURA logo (flowing A shape) displays correctly in sidebar, login, signup, and chat header
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3 features are working correctly. Theme system supports 3 modes (light/moonlight/dark) with CSS variables. Quote of the Day displays on dashboard. New AURA logo visible across all pages. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_aura_v3_features.py (13 tests for V3 features)

v3_theme_system.settings_page_theme_cards: PASS - All 3 cards (Light/Moonlight/Dark) visible and clickable
v3_theme_system.theme_persistence_navigation: PASS - Theme persists when navigating between pages
v3_theme_system.theme_persistence_localstorage: PASS - Theme stored in localStorage as 'aura-theme'
v3_theme_system.css_variables_light: PASS - Light mode uses warm tones (#F9F8F6 bg, #1A1D1A text)
v3_theme_system.css_variables_moonlight: PASS - Moonlight mode uses blue-grey dusk (#1E2130 bg, #E4E6F0 text)
v3_theme_system.css_variables_dark: PASS - Dark mode uses deep charcoal (#111214 bg, #E8E9EC text)

v3_quote_of_day.dashboard_display: PASS - Quote displayed below greeting on dashboard

v3_new_logo.login_page: PASS - AURA logo visible on login page
v3_new_logo.signup_page: PASS - AURA logo visible on signup page
v3_new_logo.sidebar: PASS - AURA logo visible in sidebar
v3_new_logo.chat_header: PASS - AURA logo visible in chat header
